crossEventQuestion: When should capital investment be paired with operating-resource growth versus constrained?
observation: In 2022 broad cloud demand drove both sequential CapEx and 20% headcount growth across engineering and sales; by 2023 AI infrastructure demand drove material CapEx while operating-expense growth was explicitly kept low; in 2024 the pattern shifted again with accelerating CapEx paired with third-party capacity to meet pipeline demand.
invariant: Capital investment is always demand-led and always paired with a deliberate operating-resource mix (expand/constrain/reallocate) rather than scaled uniformly.
boundaryConditions: Broad demand across multiple growth areas (2022)
Concentrated AI infrastructure demand under profitability pressure (2023)
Demand exceeding owned buildout lead times (2024)

decisionAxis.decisionQuestion: Should CapEx growth be paired with operating-resource expansion or constraint?

conditions: demand exceeding owned buildout lead times

conditionDelta: from broad demand (2022) and concentrated AI demand (2023) to demand exceeding owned buildout lead times (2024)
actionDelta: from scaling/constraining internal resources to supplementing with third-party capacity
